trigger: 30-minute MVP builder run: add an account smoke page panel to exercise Drive file-byte upload + download via the authenticated evidence endpoints (no passwords committed).
scope: Extend the fake-account smoke page with a Drive file upload/download panel that calls /api/submissions/:id/evidence/upload and /api/evidence/:id/download against the seeded Maya submission fixture, while showing expected allow/deny outcomes across roles and keeping evidence ids in-memory (no localStorage / no committed credentials).
changes: Updated account.html with a Drive file bytes panel (upload + download controls), plus cache-busting version bumps for account.css/account.js.
Updated account.css with account-drive-form styling consistent with existing account-form controls.

Updated account.js to upload a <=5MB file as evidence for the seeded submission-alpha-maya-proposal fixture, record the new evidence id, and download bytes back through the scoped /api/evidence/:id/download endpoint using a temporary object URL (revoked on reset).
Extended the smoke checklist to track Drive upload/download outcomes alongside protected evidence + health checks.
Updated docs/mvp-requirements-catalog.md and docs/progress/run-log.md with the new MVP-013 manual verification surface.
known_limits: Drive file upload/download requires GOOGLE_DRIVE_EVIDENCE_ROOT_ID plus GOOGLE_DRIVE_CLIENT_EMAIL/GOOGLE_DRIVE_PRIVATE_KEY to be configured in Cloudflare Pages; otherwise the upload/download routes return 503.
The upload endpoint enforces a 5MB limit; larger evidence requires resumable Drive uploads.
The smoke page uses Response.blob() + URL.createObjectURL() for the download button, which buffers bytes in the browser and is intended for small verification files.
next_actions: Configure Cloudflare Pages secrets GOOGLE_DRIVE_CLIENT_EMAIL and GOOGLE_DRIVE_PRIVATE_KEY and confirm /api/health reports googleDriveCredentialsConfigured=true.
Use account.html Drive file bytes panel to verify a real upload (student) and cross-role download (mentor/teacher/admin) in preview/production.
Implement resumable uploads for larger evidence artifacts and consider wiring file upload into the alpha console/student UI once verified.
